name: @daicer/backend
description: Multiplayer D&D backend with Express, Socket.io, and Firebase for Daicer

scripts.dev: echo '🚀 Starting backend dev server on http://localhost:3001' && FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.dev:all: echo '🎯 Starting BOTH backend (3001) + Studio server (3002)...' && concurrently --names 'BACKEND,STUDIO' --prefix-colors 'cyan,magenta' 'tsx watch src/server.ts' 'tsx watch src/server-langgraph-studio.ts'
scripts.dev:wait: wait-on http://localhost:3001/health -t 30000 && echo '✅ Backend is ready!'
scripts.studio: echo '🎨 Starting LangGraph Studio server on http://localhost:3002' && tsx watch src/server-langgraph-studio.ts
scripts.build: echo '📦 Building backend...' && tsc && echo '✅ Backend build complete! Output: dist/'
scripts.start: echo '🌐 Starting production server...' && node dist/server.js
scripts.start:wait: wait-on http://localhost:3001/health -t 30000 && echo '✅ Backend is ready!'
scripts.seed: yarn seed:gamedata && yarn seed:srd && yarn seed:spells
scripts.seed:gamedata: echo '🌱 Seeding game data...' && tsx ../seeds/scripts/seed-game-data.ts && echo '✅ Game data seeded!'
scripts.seed:srd: echo '📚 Seeding SRD rules...' && tsx ../seeds/scripts/seed-srd-rules.ts && echo '✅ SRD rules seeded!'
scripts.seed:spells: echo '🔮 Seeding spells...' && tsx ../seeds/scripts/seed-spells.ts && echo '✅ Spells seeded!'
scripts.seed:roles: echo '👥 Seeding role users...' && tsx src/scripts/seed-role-users.ts && echo '✅ Role users seeded!'
scripts.lint:fix: echo '🔧 Fixing linting issues...' && eslint . --ext .ts --fix && echo '✅ Linting complete!'
scripts.format: echo '✨ Formatting backend code...' && prettier --write "src/**/*.ts" --log-level silent && echo '✅ Formatting complete!'
scripts.typecheck: echo '🔬 Type checking backend...' && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' tsc --noEmit && echo '✅ Type check passed!'
scripts.test: echo '🧪 Running backend tests...' && NODE_ENV=test jest
scripts.test:watch: echo '👀 Running tests in watch mode...' && NODE_ENV=test jest --watch
scripts.test:coverage: echo '📊 Running tests with coverage...' && NODE_ENV=test jest --coverage && echo '✅ Coverage report: coverage/index.html'
scripts.test:ci: echo '🤖 Running tests (CI mode)...' && NODE_ENV=test jest --coverage --ci --maxWorkers=2
scripts.test:ui: echo '⚠️  Backend uses Jest (no UI mode). Starting watch mode instead...' && yarn test:watch
scripts.fix: echo '🔧 Auto-fixing backend...' && yarn format && yarn lint:fix && echo '✅ Backend auto-fix complete!'
